data.name: SiteEmailAddressDescription
data.value: Site email address. This address is used when emails are sent.

data.name: SystemConfigurationDescription
data.value: Change site name, e-mail address or slogan.

data.name: TheMinimumLengthAPasswordMustBeDefaultsTo6
data.value: The minimum length a password must be. Defaults to 6.

data.name: TheMinimumNumberOfUniqueCharactersWhichAPasswordMustContain
data.value: The minimum number of unique characters which a password must contain

data.name: PasswordsMustContainANonAlphanumericCharacter
data.value: Passwords must contain a non-alphanumeric character.

data.name: PasswordsMustContainALowerCaseASCIICharacter
data.value: Passwords must contain a lower case ASCII character.

data.name: PasswordsMustContainAUpperCaseASCIICharacter
data.value: Passwords must contain a upper case ASCII character.

data.name: TheNumberOfFailedAccessAttemptsAllowedBeforeAUserIsLockedOutIfLockoutIsEnabled
data.value: The number of failed access attempts allowed before a user is locked out, if lockout is enabled.

data.name: TheLockOutTimeInMinutesIfAUserIsLockedOutForWhenALockoutOccurs
data.value: The lock out time in minutes if a user is locked out for when a lockout occurs.

data.name: AUserMustHaveAConfirmedEmailAddressBeforeTheyCanSignIn
data.value: A user must have a confirmed email address before they can sign in.

data.name: AUserMustHaveAConfirmedAccountBeforeTheyCanSignIn
data.value: A user must have a confirmed account before they can sign in.

data.name: LocalizedResourceDublicate
data.value: Dual value of a localized resource.

data.name: TokenCreateInfo
data.value: Warning - Make sure you copy the above token now. It's not stored it and you will not be able to see it again.

data.name: TokenCreateSucceeded
data.value: You have successfully added a new personal access token. Copy the token now!

data.name: ModuleInstallationUnknownService
data.value: Module installation failed. Module requires {0} service that is not intalled.

data.name: ContentEdited
data.value: Update failed. Content has been edited by another user.

data.name: UsersMustBelongToAtLeastOneUserGroup
data.value: Users must belong to at least one user group.

data.name: InvalidUserRoleAtLeastOneRoleMustBeSelected
data.value: Invalid user role. At least one role must be selected.

data.name: CronDescription
data.value: Cron takes care of running periodic tasks like checking for updates.

data.name: StatisticDescription
data.value: Statisics helps to improve the site reaction speed.

data.name: RolesDescription
data.value: Roles are used to manage permissions.

data.name: TargetMustBelongToOneGroup
data.value: Target must belong to at least one group.

data.name: PerformanceDescription
data.value: Enable or disable notification to improve performance for large amounts of meters.

data.name: ExternalAuthenticationDescription
data.value: External authentications allows logging in via external services.

data.name: KeyManagementsDescription
data.value: With the key managements, the settings of encrypted connections are processed.

data.name: SystemTitleIsAlreadyInUse
data.value: System title {0} is already in use.

data.name: WithScriptsEnabledWorkflowsFuntionalityCanBeExpandWithScripts
data.value: With Scripts enabled, workflows funtionality can be expand with scripts.

data.name: MaintenanceDescription
data.value: Take the site offline for maintenance or bring it back online.

data.name: ManufacturerDescription
data.value: Using manufacturers new device templates can be offered for the users.

data.name: WorkflowDescription
data.value: With Workflows enabled, new custom workflows funtionality can be offered for the users.

data.name: TriggerDescription
data.value: With triggers enabled, new custom functionality can be offered for the users.

data.name: BlockDescription
data.value: With blocks enabled, new custom user interfaces can be offered for the users.

data.name: ComponentViewDescription
data.value: With component views enabled, new custom user interfaces can be offered for the users.

data.name: ModuleDescription
data.value: With modules enabled, new custom functionality can be offered for the users.

data.name: LanguageDescription
data.value: With multiple languages enabled, interface text can be translated and registered users may select their preferred language.

data.name: ScriptDescription
data.value: With Scripts enabled, workflows funtionality can be expand with scripts.

data.name: JoinedGroupsAreNotInserted
data.value: New groups must be added first.

data.name: ReportDescription
data.value: Reports can be used to improve the creation of reports from a large amount of data.

data.name: SubtotalDescription
data.value: Subtotals can be used to improve the creation of reports from a large amount of data.

data.name: NotificationDescription
data.value: When notification is enabled, users can be notified of additions, deletions, or updates.

data.name: PruneDescription
data.value: Prune removes unused targets based on criteria such as time.

data.name: DataExchangeDescription
data.value: With data exchange user can import and export data.

data.name: AppearanceDescription
data.value: Appearance can be used to customize the user theme and icons.

data.name: ProxyDescription
data.value: Proxy can be used to route and load-balance incoming requests across multiple backend services.

data.name: IpAccessDescription
data.value: IP access control can be used to block specific clients, IP addresses, or request patterns before they reach the application, improving security and reducing unwanted traffic.

data.name: PATExpiring
data.value: PAT Expiring.html;System.String, mscorlib, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b77a5c561934e089;utf-8

data.name: PATExpired
data.value: PAT Expired.html;System.String, mscorlib, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b77a5c561934e089;utf-8

data.name: AccountDescription
data.value: Configure default user account settings, including fields, registration requirements, and email messages.

data.name: LocalizedResourceDescription
data.value: With multiple languages enabled, interface text can be translated and registered users may select their preferred language.
